details: Happy 1st Month Anniversary!
To my dearest Noey...😘
I can't believe it's already been a month since we started this journey.
Time flies so fast when I'm with you
Thank you for being here with me every day. ❤️
Do you remember the first day we talked? 😊
From strangers to the person who be my gf.
Even though it's only been about 4 months...
It feels like I've known you so longgg 😂
I'm sorry if I'm a bit clingy 🙂
But everything I do is because I care about you so much naaa Bibi
Every moment spent with you...
Has become my favorite memory jing jing na !!!
I want to wake up to talk with U every morning
I want to travel to a thousand more places with you
Let's keep growing and learning about each other like this
I promise to cherish our love the best I can 😍
I love you more than words can say na, Novi Noey! ❤️
Do U love me wa I Noey ????
I'm so happy to hear that naaa teeruk 😁
From this day forward
I'll make every day feel like the first day we became a couple 😘
I promise I’m not going anywhere. 😙
Happy 1st Month Anniversary na kubb, my love 😉
